title: Customise your workdoc with your own custom cover photo 🚀

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Take your Workdoc to the next level by uploading your own custom cover photo

We are excited to announce this new release after receiving community feedback concerning the level of customisation in workdocs. Now, you can finally create a look & feel that suits your brand!

GIFs are supported too

Find more details on how you can style your doc here → here ←
